text: Standing in this modern, quiet corridor, then moving into this vibrant, intellectual space of "Responsive and Rapidly Evolving Development," I feel a subtle thrill of curiosity. Glass walls and stark lighting offer transparency—a symbol, perhaps, of openness to new ideas. The next room, awash in color and concepts, speaks to the ever-shifting boundaries between human and machine. I sense both anticipation and humility: the future is unwritten, shaped by constant discovery and dialogue.
